text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer. I'll be able to run again before
you know it.
choice_data_list: It's fine. You should rest for today.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, after I've rested a little, do you think I can
run again for a bit?
choice_data_list:
You'll only make your condition worse if you
push it.

As soon as you feel better, you can run as much
as you want!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um, after I've rested a little, do you think I can
run again for a bit?
choice_data_list:
You'll only make your condition worse if you
push it.

As soon as you feel better, you can run as much
as you want!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Um... Do you think you could keep an eye on me
so I don't go off running?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure I have... the discipline.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I respect Suzuka's request and stay by her side in
the infirmary until nightfall.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I won't be able to run today, right? What a
shame. It's still so bright out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to run due to her injury, Silence Suzuka
falls into a mental slump.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'll get better as soon as possible, for the
sake of running.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I want you to search for lots of beautiful
places to go running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Silence Suzuka is burning with
determination despite her injury. I should get to
finding new running courses right away.
